description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a tan and black color scheme, featuring a robust metal receiver and a polymer stock. The shotgun has a long, cylindrical barrel with a black muzzle and a rail system mounted on top for attaching optics or accessories. The stock is adjustable and includes a black rubberized buttpad for recoil absorption, while the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling. The magazine is box-shaped and detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tan and black tactical shotgun with a long barrel, adjustable stock, and box magazine. It features a rail system and ergonomic grip for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, rail system, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrel, adjustable stock, box magazine, and rail system.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and the detailed structure of the stock and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: full stock with adjustable length and rubberized buttpad
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space for gloved fingers
